steps.title: Identify the slope of line t
steps.content: The equation $y = -\frac{1}{4}x + 15$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$. The slope is $m = -\frac{1}{4}$.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular line shortcut
steps.content:
Perpendicular lines have slopes that are negative reciprocals of each other.

To find the negative reciprocal of $-\frac{1}{4}$:
  • The reciprocal of $-\frac{1}{4}$ is $-4$
  • Negate it: $-(-4) = 4$
Therefore, the slope of line s is $4$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
